author.bio: Builder of open internets by day, player of DJ musics by night. I don't tweet much since the US elections, but I still lurk a lot 😊
author.name: Jessica Schilling

content.text: Hey #IPFS and #dweb friends! Help us create a next-generation navigation for http://docs.ipfs.io 😊 Join in a collaborative usability session Fri 6 Sep from 1700-1830 UTC on this video call ... http://protocol.zoom.us/my/docsforce
